title: cyclosorus euaensis
intro: Cyclosorus euaensis, also known as the Eua maiden's hair fern, is a species of fern native to the island of Eua in Tonga. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyclosorus euaensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe skin irritations. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
